title: bus.tengine.wave.gate.pending v1
description: When: A wave reaches a gate and is pending evaluation before dispatches can proceed. Source: /tengine. Emitted by the orchestrator when a wave gate condition is detected and the pipeline must wait for gate resolution (approval, anti-deferment check, or integration log review).

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

wave_name.description: Name of the wave that has hit the gate and is now pending evaluation.

just_landed.description: List of bead IDs that just landed in the wave and have not yet been dispatched.

next_dispatches.description: List of bead IDs that are queued for dispatch next if the gate clears.

anti_deferment_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the anti-deferment analysis: which beads appear to defer work and what the recommended action is.

integration_log_url.description: Optional URL to the integration log showing what has already run in this wave.
